name: International Cappuccino Coffee Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. To prepare one cup of coffee, measure 1 tablespoon of the mixture into a mug.
3. Pour 1 1/2 cups boiling water over the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Top with whipped cream.
5. For a smaller serving, use 1/2 tablespoon of the mixture and 3/4 cup boiling water.
6. This recipe serves approximately 10-12 people.
